User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Important pages for crawling
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms

# Block unnecessary paths to optimize crawl budget
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-login.php

# Allow Google to index images and assets
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /*.css$
Allow: /*.js$
Allow: /*.png$
Allow: /*.jpg$
Allow: /*.jpeg$
Allow: /*.gif$
Allow: /*.webp$
Allow: /*.svg$
Allow: /*.ico$

# Sitemap location - must be absolute URL
Sitemap: https://californiasettlementcalculator.com/sitemap.xml
